title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.3152 - Appeal procedure for denial
text:
301.3152.  Appeal procedure for denial. — Any person or organization who has received a notice of denial of application for development of a specialty plate may make a request to the joint committee on transportation oversight within fifteen days of receipt of the notice for a review of the committee's determination at a hearing before the committee at a time deemed appropriate.
(L. 2004 S.B. 1233, et al.) 
Effective 1-01-05
